result.stdout:
Description:
  CMPDF-based commands,in order to compress the pdf size

Usage:
  CCPDF [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  compress  compress the pdf file
  resize    resize the image file
  rezip     resize image files or pdf files in zip file

commands.payload:
Description:
  CMPDF-based commands,in order to compress the pdf size

Usage:
  CCPDF [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  compress  compress the pdf file
  resize    resize the image file
  rezip     resize image files or pdf files in zip file

result.stdout:
Description:
  compress the pdf file

Usage:
  CCPDF compress [options]

Options:
  --file <file>              The file to read
  --maxWidth <maxWidth>      Minimum image width to compress [default: 800]
  --outputFile <outputFile>  The compressed file
  --noPrompt                 Write file without prompt [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

  --noPrompt                 Write file without prompt [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information
